case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. BICH HOANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-29-2024 ISSUED TO ATTORNEY LYNDA JACOBS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY THE COURT. SANCTIONS PAID ON 3/27/24. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)

MINUTES FOR MAR-18-2024 9:50 AM
TRIAL COMMENCED.
TRIAL CONCLUDED IN .5 DAY.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT HOANG, BICH

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210033876) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HOANG, BICH DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2023
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210037017), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SERVED MAY-13-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOANG, BICH
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100201946) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOANG, BICH

MASTER COURT TRIAL CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2024 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAR-18-2024 AT 9:50 AM IN DEPT. 303, JUDGE SUZANNE RAMOS BOLANOS. DOUGLAS STUART WALLACE, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. WENDY SKILLMAN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR ATTORNEY LYNDA JACOBS, COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT. SANCTIONS IS IMPOSED ON ATTORNEY LYNDA JACOBS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-29-2024. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET FOR HEARING ON MAR-29-2024 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID, THEN THE OSC WILL BE VACATED. DEFENDANT'S ORAL REQUEST TO CONTINUE TRIAL BECAUSE CLIENT IS NOT AVAILABLE AND ATTORNEY SKILLMAN HAS NO AUTHORITY SINCE SHE IS ONLY SPECIALLY APPEARING. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 79304936) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HOANG, BICH
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210033876) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
PLAINTIFFS TRIAL BRIEF (TRANSACTION ID # 72008050) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
